entries.t: n. (女王的)王室法律顾问, 御用大律师
abbr. 质量检查处（Quality Control Division）
entries.d: n. a theory of strong interactions between elementary particles (including the interaction that binds protons and neutrons in the nucleus); it assumes that strongly interacting particles (hadrons) are made of quarks and that gluons bind the quarks together

entries.t: [医] 结节型皮肤利什曼病
abbr. Quality Control Manual 质量管理手册
abbr. quality control planning 质量控制计划; quality control procedure 质量控制规程; quality care program 质量护理项目; quantum critical point 量子临界点
abbr. 质量控制系统（Quality Control System）
abbr. quality control technician 质量管理技术员; questionable corrective task 有疑问的的矫正作业; quiescent carrier telephony 静止的载波电话学
n. 具有Q相位的3.58MHz连续波讯号
